title: An $89 Million Oceanfront Estate with 250 Feet of Beachfront Hits the Market in Miami's Exclusive Golden Beach
titleZh: 迈阿密独家黄金海滩8900万美元海滨豪宅上市，坐拥250英尺海岸线
excerpt: An extraordinary oceanfront compound in Golden Beach — one of Miami's most coveted and private barrier island communities — has listed at $89 million, offering 250 feet of direct Atlantic beachfront across a sprawling estate.
excerptZh: 迈阿密最受追捧的私密社区黄金海滩的一处非凡海滨豪宅以8900万美元挂牌上市，坐拥250英尺大西洋直接海岸线，横跨宽阔庄园。

title: How Real Estate Could Become the Real Quiet Luxury Performer of 2026
titleZh: 房地产如何成为2026年「低调奢华」投资领域的真正领跑者
excerpt: As equities fluctuate and alternative assets gain scrutiny, luxury real estate is quietly positioning itself as the defining wealth vehicle of 2026 — combining tangible security with enduring lifestyle value.
excerptZh: 随着股市波动、另类资产受到审视，豪华房地产正悄然定位为2026年财富配置的核心标的，将有形资产安全性与持久生活价值完美融合。

title: The Jills Zeder Group Set a Miami-Dade Record with Indian Creek Island Sale Over the $100 Million Mark
titleZh: Jills Zeder集团以逾亿美元成交价刷新迈阿密戴德县房产纪录
excerpt: A landmark transaction on Indian Creek Island — known as the 'Billionaire Bunker' — has shattered Miami-Dade's previous sales record, underscoring the sustained global demand for ultra-prime waterfront real estate.
excerptZh: 在被誉为「亿万富翁碉堡」的印第安溪岛上，一笔里程碑式的交易打破了迈阿密戴德县的历史成交纪录，彰显出全球市场对顶级海滨房产的持续强劲需求。

title: A Boutique Luxury Development in Brookline's Coolidge Corner Offers a Rarity: Single-Story Luxury Between Two Parks
titleZh: 布鲁克莱恩库利奇角精品豪华新盘：两公园之间的罕见单层奢居
excerpt: A newly completed boutique development in one of Greater Boston's most walkable neighborhoods presents an increasingly rare offering — single-level luxury residences with private outdoor space, framed by two of Brookline's beloved parks.
excerptZh: 大波士顿地区步行便利性最佳社区之一的精品新楼盘，提供日益稀缺的单层奢华住宅，配备私人户外空间，两侧毗邻布鲁克莱恩备受喜爱的公园。
